name: Your Dynamic Scene Name
description: Describe the visual effect across multiple lights. For example: warm sunset colors slowly rotating between lights with staggered transitions.
author: YourGitHubUsername
notes: Explain the mood and best room setup. Color fields use CIE 1931 XY coordinates (use the panel color picker to get values). Distribution modes: 'shuffle_rotate' (each light gets a different color, rotating), 'synchronized' (all lights same color), 'random' (random assignment each cycle). Offset delay staggers transitions for a ripple effect.
